eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Shawnee, KS; at 9:02 AM on SEP 9, 2019 Effective until 9:17 AM. Message from SNCO EOC.
extra_text: This is a test. This is only a test of the Shawnee County IPAWS System.  EM6 No response is required.
